betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Stirling Engine§f

§aConverts heat to electricity — cheap early power, but watch the overspeed.§f

The §bStirling Engine§f must be placed directly above a heat source (firebox, heating oven). Operates at 50% efficiency.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at a Tier 2 anvil from: oak planks ×16, steel plates ×6, red copper ×8, copper coils ×4, large gear.

§6Overspeed Danger§f:
Max safe input: §e300 TU/t§f (150 HE/t). Above that, the engine audibly warns then launches its gear — destroys blocks, kills entities. Gear is retrievable.

§6Heavy Variant§f:
Handles §e1,500 TU/t§f. Crafted at Tier 2 anvil from: steel plates ×16, beryllium ingots ×6, red copper ×8, gold coils ×16, large steel gear.

§eTip§f: Stick to low-heat fuels (lignite, charcoal) with the standard engine. Use the heavy variant for rocket fuel or blaze rods.
